violations.text: Establishment is using a non-food contact sanitizer for the food contact surfaces of the bread racks. Food contact surfaces must be sanitized with a sanitizer that is safe for food-contact surfaces. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
